PARTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 25, 2015 OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/EG

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ALEXANDER PIERCE AND GLORIA SISCO'S motion to strike the punitive damages allegations is denied and plaintiffs' request for sanctions is denied. The punitive damages allegations are adequately pled. Plaintiffs did not comply with CCP 128.7 but, even if they, the motion to strike, while lacking merit, is not frivolous. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
